blocked_by: Conflict: context-snapshot.ts already exists with different purpose

details.issue: TASK-633 spec requires JSON-based snapshot generator (120K trigger, LRU cleanup, <500KB), but node/src/core/context-snapshot.ts already exists as SQLite-based tacit knowledge manager (completely different schema/purpose)
options: A. Rename existing to context-tacit-knowledge.ts, implement TASK-633 as specified
B. Merge TASK-633 into existing manager (add LRU + JSON export methods)
C. Create separate context-incremental-snapshot.ts for TASK-633
details.recommendation: Option C — separate file. Existing manager is for tacit knowledge (post-task retrospective), TASK-633 is for runtime context backup (120K threshold). Different triggers, lifecycles, and purposes. Clean separation maintains SRP.
